title: Most Attractive Character
wikitext:
[]: Most Attractive Character?             Quote Post by digital88 » Sat Dec 22, 2007 6:28 am Well my 2nd post, Well it juz came to me when i was watching Pokemon(I was bored and there was nothing else on tv ok), most Japanese anime make our hero/heroines mom freaking HOT..i mean if u look at Yui, SHES FREAKING HOT for a mom D i can only imagine if she was still alive n Well, She would still look HOT...so what u think guys? is it on purpose to make moms look hotter or do Japanese people just enjoy some milf action?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Dec 22, 2007 10:40 am It's like he read a "how to score points with the higher ups" pamphlet before he posted...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Dec 22, 2007 10:55 am "Yui is HAWT" is pure speculation, sirs, awaiting independent confirmation.

[]:             Quote Post by rain1776 » Sat Dec 22, 2007 11:46 am lol. so you got the idea to post about evangelion from pokemon?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Dec 22, 2007 12:17 pm FUN FACT: If a lady is HAWT enough, they turn into a mom. For MOAR on that, go ask any lady with the last name of Spears.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Dec 22, 2007 3:58 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: FUN FACT: If a lady is HAWT enough, they turn into a mom. For MOAR on that, go ask any lady with the last name of Spears.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Dec 22, 2007 4:35 pm thanks I'll be here all week oh, and don't forget the tip jar on your way out later

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Dec 22, 2007 5:00 pm She's hot because she's designed to look like Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Dec 22, 2007 5:12 pm Wow that's shallow... Isn't it the other way around anyways?

[]:             Quote Post by Sheer Heart Attack » Sat Dec 22, 2007 5:38 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: It's like he read a "how to score points with the higher ups" pamphlet before he posted...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 22, 2007 5:39 pm All anime women are good looking, until they turn into homely old aunties as they get towards 50. Myself, I find Yui somewhat insipid, and would much prefer Ritsuko as mai waifu.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat Dec 22, 2007 11:36 pm Yaah Yui is a total MILF.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 23, 2007 12:00 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Wow that's shallow... Isn't it the other way around anyways?

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 23, 2007 12:03 am Actually, neither were. One was created that was both of them rolled into one, then it was changed into Yui and Rei. I think it was named Yui with a different last name.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Dec 23, 2007 3:05 am Has anyone seen Ranma 1/2? It's my 2nd best favourite anime cartoon. I have to agree with you there, I mean, in that cartoon, right, pretty much EVERY mum and girl is freakin' HOT! And I mean it. Except for that 300 year old grandmother...But other than that, totally everyone is freakin' hot. I wish they were real...(cries in desperation) :cry: :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 23, 2007 3:57 pm They are all drawn like that for the sake of the few decades of the evolution of manga and anime. I am not too sure why people get so excited though.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 23, 2007 6:07 pm Shiro wrote: Actually, neither were. One was created that was both of them rolled into one, then it was changed into Yui and Rei. I think it was named Yui with a different last name.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Dec 23, 2007 6:17 pm Yes Yuis hot and because of this Shinji has a huge Oedipus complex :) They designed the character of Rei first and the idea of yui came along after.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 23, 2007 8:23 pm Rei's original character was named Yui Ichigo in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Sun Dec 23, 2007 9:50 pm I meant design wise. Rei and Yui's design in the beginning of the creative process was "Yui Ichigo" which looked like Yui and Rei rolled into one, and 14 years old. This design eventually because Rei and Yui Ikari. (http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yui_Ikari, scroll to the bottom for the image)
